_comment: Example JSON envelope produced by `gh-aw-fleet consumption --output json` AFTER this feature ships. Shows the ConsumptionResult shape under result:. Envelope schema_version remains 1 (additive new subcommand; SC-006). Envelope key set matches cmd/output.go's Envelope struct exactly: schema_version, command, repo, apply, result, warnings, hints. The `repo` envelope field is empty because consumption is fleet-wide, mirroring `list`.

groups._comment_group_1: Repo with a populated upstream cost value — surfaces alongside API-call volume.

groups._comment_group_2: Repo with no populated cost — cost field is omitted via omitempty (Decision 6).

groups._comment_group_3: Repo with only 3 reports in the 7-day window — others were in-progress or expired; per-row report_count reveals sparse coverage so operators can spot it.

top_burners._comment_top_1: Highest-burner workflow across the whole fleet. Ranked by api_calls (cost-when-populated is informational at v1 — see Decision 6 and Story 4 acceptance #3).

warnings._comment_warning_1: Repo enumerated in fleet config but has zero discovered consumption discussions. Code DiagHint (Decision 8); message points at the prerequisite workflow installation.
warnings.message: No consumption reports discovered for rshade/example-no-reports — the api-consumption-report workflow is either not deployed to this repo or has not yet produced a daily report. See: deploy api-consumption-report via your default profile.

warnings._comment_warning_2: Repo had a recent in-progress report that the rollup included (trailing-window mode includes them per FR-012). Code DiagHint; one diagnostic per included in-progress report.
warnings.message: Included in-progress report from rshade/example-spotty (2026-05-13). Totals for this repo may be partial.

warnings._comment_warning_3: Run-log artifact garbage-collected past the platform's ~90-day retention. Discovery succeeded; fetch failed cleanly with the HTTP 404 family hint (Decision 8 reuses DiagHTTP404).
warnings.message: Run artifact for rshade/example-old (run #4517 on 2026-02-08) is past the ~90-day run-log retention window. Source path not found. Check the spec — `github/gh-aw` workflows live under `.github/workflows/`; `githubnext/agentics` workflows live under `workflows/`.
